## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated — `go test -race ./...` (and `-tags e2e ./e2e/...` if behavior changed)
- [ ] `go vet`, `staticcheck`, and `gosec` (medium+) pass
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] No secret values or private keys included anywhere in the diff
